nodes.label: Phase Accumulator
nodes.description: Tracks the current position in the waveform cycle via the uptime counter

nodes.label: Waveform Select
nodes.description: Selects the waveform generation method based on WaveformType

nodes.label: WaveformType
nodes.description: Selects between Sine, Triangle, Saw, Square, Random, Custom, or Steps

nodes.label: Table Lookup
nodes.description: Interpolated lookup from a pre-computed waveform table (Sine/Triangle/Saw/Square) or user-drawn table (Custom)

nodes.label: Random Value
nodes.description: Generates a new random value once per cycle

nodes.label: Step Sequencer
nodes.description: Reads the current step value from the slider pack, advancing on each cycle

nodes.label: NumSteps
nodes.description: Number of steps in the step sequencer

nodes.label: Fade-In Envelope
nodes.description: Exponential fade-in envelope that ramps LFO intensity after note trigger

nodes.label: FadeIn
nodes.description: Fade-in time in milliseconds

nodes.label: Mode Output Mapping
nodes.description: Transforms the waveform+envelope value based on modulation mode (Gain/Pitch/Pan) and bipolar setting

nodes.label: Smoothing
nodes.description: Low-pass smoothing filter to reduce discontinuities

nodes.label: SmoothingTime
nodes.description: Smoothing time in milliseconds

nodes.label: LFO Intensity Mod
nodes.description: Scales the LFO output depth

nodes.label: Frequency Calculation
nodes.description: Calculates the phase increment (angleDelta) from frequency, tempo sync, and frequency modulation

nodes.label: Frequency
nodes.description: LFO rate in Hz or tempo-synced note division

nodes.label: TempoSync
nodes.description: Switches Frequency between Hz and tempo division

nodes.label: Host BPM
nodes.description: Host tempo used for tempo-synced frequency calculation

nodes.label: LFO Frequency Mod
nodes.description: Modulates the LFO frequency

nodes.label: PhaseOffset
nodes.description: Initial phase offset applied on reset

nodes.label: Legato
nodes.description: Prevents phase reset on overlapping notes

nodes.label: IgnoreNoteOn
nodes.description: Free-run mode, no note-triggered phase reset

nodes.label: LoopEnabled
nodes.description: Enables waveform looping (only affects Custom and Steps modes)

nodes.label: SyncToMasterClock
nodes.description: Syncs phase to host transport position (requires TempoSync)

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Final modulation value sent to the parent modulation chain
